vaderSentiment>=3.3       # VADER sentiment
nrclex>=3.0               # NRC emotion lexicon (installs the lexicon automatically)

# ── BERT (optional — comment out if not needed) ──────────────────────────────
sentence-transformers>=2.2
transformers>=4.35
torch>=2.0
